framework.name: EU AI Act
framework.disclaimer: Summaries of EU AI Act articles are independently written for educational reference. The official, legally binding text is published in the Official Journal of the European Union (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689). Do not rely on this tool for legal or compliance decisions.

controls.title: Risk Management System
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must establish, implement, and maintain a continuous risk management system across the lifecycle.

controls.title: Data and Data Governance
controls.statement: Training, validation, and testing data for high-risk AI must meet quality and governance criteria, including bias examination.

controls.title: Technical Documentation
controls.statement: Providers of high-risk AI must draw up and keep up to date technical documentation demonstrating conformity before the system is placed on the market.

controls.title: Record-Keeping (Logging)
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must automatically record events (logs) over their lifetime to ensure traceability.

controls.title: Transparency and Information to Deployers
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must be transparent enough for deployers to interpret output and use the system appropriately, with clear instructions for use.

controls.title: Human Oversight
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must be designed to allow effective human oversight that can prevent or minimize risks.

controls.title: Accuracy, Robustness and Cybersecurity
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must achieve appropriate levels of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity, and perform consistently.

controls.title: Obligations of Providers
controls.statement: Providers of high-risk AI systems must ensure conformity, maintain documentation, implement a quality management system, and cooperate with authorities.

controls.title: Quality Management System
controls.statement: Providers must put in place a documented quality management system covering compliance strategy, design control, testing, and post-market monitoring.

controls.title: Obligations of Deployers
controls.statement: Deployers of high-risk AI must use systems per instructions, ensure human oversight, monitor operation, and keep logs.

controls.title: Transparency for Certain AI Systems
controls.statement: Providers and deployers must inform people when they interact with AI, and label synthetic or manipulated content such as deepfakes.

controls.title: Post-Market Monitoring
controls.statement: Providers must establish a post-market monitoring system to collect and review the performance of high-risk AI systems throughout their lifetime.
